controls.control_description:

Banks - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the requirements of the state co-operative societies acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments
controls.control_description:
A bank shall follow the requirements of the State Co-operative Societies Acts
and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments, if they are more
stringent than those prescribed hereby.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the requirements of the state co-operative societies acts and / or rules made thereunder, or other statutory enactments

The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,

The terms 'Commercial Real Estate (CRE)', 'Commercial Real Estate -

(Urban Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning assigned to them in the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac

All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or the companies ac

controls.control_description:
A bank shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after december 31, 2021: (1) the exact due dates for repayment of a lo

controls.control_description:

and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction

controls.control_description:
In case of constraints such as non-availability of financial statements and other
data from the borrowers, the bank shall furnish evidence to show that renewal/
review of credit limits is already on and would be completed soon.

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to the board approved policy on methodology and periodicity for review / renewal of credit facilities within the overall regulatory gu

A bank shall strictly adhere to the Board approved policy on methodology and
periodicity for review / renewal of credit facilities within the overall regulatory
guidelines.

controls.control_objective: To ensure avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities without justifiable reasons
controls.control_description:
A bank shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit
facilities without justifiable reasons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities without justifiable reasons

controls.control_objective: To ensure capture all the data relating to regular as well as ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities in its core banking systems / management info
controls.control_description:
A bank shall capture all the data relating to regular as well as ad-hoc / short
review / renewal of credit facilities in its core banking systems / management
information systems and make the same available for scrutiny as and when
required by any audit or inspection by Auditors / the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to capture all the data relating to regular as well as ad-hoc / short review / renewal of credit facilities in its core banking systems / management info

controls.control_description:

processes governing review / renewal of credit facilities shall be brought under
the scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the bank.

controls.control_description:

reference to day-end process;

requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks
- Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as a standard asset or a non-
performing asset, as the case may be.

A bank shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end

controls.control_description:
Thus, the date of SMA/NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of an
account at the day-end of that calendar date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the asset classification status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be march 31, 2021
controls.control_description:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the bank runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.

controls.control_objective: To ensure have implemented system-based asset classification by june 30, 2021
controls.control_description:
A bank having total assets of ₹2000 crore or above as on March 31, 2020 shall
have implemented system-based asset classification by June 30, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have implemented system-based asset classification by june 30, 2021

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean asset classification (downgrading as well as upgrading) carried out by the core banking system (cbs) / computerized systems of the bank in an aut
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'System-based asset classification' shall mean asset classification
(downgrading as well as upgrading) carried out by the Core Banking System
(CBS) / computerized systems of the bank in an automated manner on an
ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean asset classification (downgrading as well as upgrading) carried out by the core banking system (cbs) / computerized systems of the bank in an aut

controls.control_objective: To ensure have implemented system-based asset classification by september 30, 2021
controls.control_description:
A bank having total assets of ₹1000 crore or above and having self-assessed
themselves as being under Level III or Level IV in terms of the circular
<image>
DoS.CO/CSITE/BC.4083/31.01.052/2019-20 dated December 31, 2019 on
Comprehensive Cyber Security Framework for banks shall have implemented
system-based asset classification by September 30, 2021.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have implemented system-based asset classification by september 30, 2021

controls.control_description:
A bank which meets the criteria in paragraph 27 as at the end of the financial
year 2020-2021 or subsequent financial years shall implement system-based
asset classification within a period of six months from the end of the financial
year concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement system-based asset classification within a period of six months from the end of the financial year concerned

controls.control_description:
For smooth implementation of the system-based asset classification system, a
bank shall conduct pilot/parallel run and evaluate the results for
accuracy/integrity of the asset classification in compliance with the applicable
RBI instructions to ensure that they are ready for implementation of the system
from the appointed date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct pilot/parallel run and evaluate the results for accuracy/integrity of the asset classification in compliance with the applicable rbi instructi

should establish appropriate internal systems to eliminate the tendency to delay
or postpone the identification of NPAs, especially in respect of high value
accounts.

which the account would have been classified as NPA as per extant guidelines.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset if any of the
following conditions are satisfied:
(1) interest and / or installment of principal remain overdue for a period of
more than 90 days in respect of a term loan;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify a loan or an advance as non-performing asset if any of the following conditions are satisfied: (1) interest and / or installment of principal

alia paragraphs 46 to 53 as well as instructions contained in the Reserve Bank
of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions,
2025.

All the facilities
granted by a bank to a borrower and investments made in all the securities issued

(NPI) and not the particular facility/investment or part thereof which has become
irregular.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be treated as npa / non-performing investment (npi) and not the particular facility/investment or part thereof which has become irregular

controls.control_description:
In addition to the principles in paragraph 35, where there is a threat of loss, or
the recoverability of the advances is in doubt, the asset should be treated as
NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the record of recovery
controls.control_description: The classification of an asset as NPA shall be based on the record of recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the record of recovery

controls.control_description:
A bank shall not classify an advance account as NPA merely due to the existence

adequate drawing power based on the latest available stock statement, balance
outstanding exceeding the limit temporarily, non-submission of stock statements
and non-renewal of the limits on the due date, etc.

accounts are classified as NPA immediately, as soon as they turn into NPA as
per the guidelines contained in these Directions, without waiting till the end of
quarter/financial year.
